title: betula alba var. glutinosa
intro: Betula alba var. glutinosa, also known as the white birch or silver birch, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe, Asia, and parts of North America. The medicinal properties of Betula alba var. glutinosa include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Betula alba var. glutinosa include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from its bark, leaves, and twigs.
